  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch detected during inspection.",
    "Conductor is undersized for the overcurrent protection device rating, violating NEC 240 and 110.14(C)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit immediately to prevent thermal damage or fire hazard.",
    "Replace the overcurrent protection device with a lower-rated breaker matching the conductor's ampacity, or pull new conductors sized appropriately for the existing breaker."
  ],
  "rationale": "A mismatch where the breaker ampacity exceeds the conductor's allowable ampacity (considering termination temperature ratings under NEC 110.14(C)) creates a severe fire hazard because the conductor can overheat before the breaker trips. This fails basic NEC 240 overcurrent protection requirements.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
